transcript: [to someone in the background] Hey, did you order some lotion?
We didn't order no lotion here!
I ain't made shit, so don't bring nothin' out here!
You're full of shit, pal. And don't start anything.
It's gonna be nothin', partner. You're just lookin' for trouble. Now don't come up here. You'll get hurt.
You in a heap of trouble. Where do you wanna meet?
'[pitch shifted]' You wanna have a little... You... You lookin' for trouble?
No, I don't have no lotion either.
I don't have no motherfuckin' lotion, man.
[laughing] Oh really? Do you have the right flavors?
[high pitched tone and long static noise]
